name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: A mutual NDA that lets two parties disclose confidential information to each other for a stated purpose while protecting it from unauthorized use or disclosure.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: A SaaS/cloud services agreement covering access and use of a cloud product, support, fees, data privacy, warranties, liability, and confidentiality between a provider and customer.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: An agreement for early access design-partner programs where a partner tests a pre-release product and gives feedback in exchange for early access.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: An SLA defining uptime targets, support response times, and service credits/remedies for a cloud service provider's performance commitments.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: An agreement governing consulting or professional services engagements, including statements of work, deliverables, IP ownership, fees, and warranties.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: A GDPR/data-protection-focused DPA covering how a service provider processes personal data on behalf of a customer, including subprocessors, international transfers, and security incidents.

name: Software License Agreement
description: A license agreement for on-premise or installed software, covering license grants, restrictions, updates, warranties, and liability between a provider and customer.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: A business partnership/alliance agreement covering mutual obligations, trademark licensing, fees, confidentiality, and dispute escalation between two companies.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: A short-term pilot/evaluation agreement allowing a customer to trial a product before entering a longer-term definitive agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: A HIPAA-compliant BAA governing how a business associate may use and protect protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity.

name: AI Addendum
description: A standard addendum to an existing agreement that governs use of AI/ML features, including input/output ownership, model training rights, and AI-specific disclaimers.
